---
title: "r5r Data Prevalidation "
---

## 1. Load Packages

```{r}
# Load packages
library(r5r)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tmap)
```

## 2. Data Loading and Pre-processing

```{r}
# Load London LSOA shapefile
lsoa_london <- st_read("lsoa_london/lsoa_london.shp")
```

```{r}
# Load Greenspace Access Points
greenspace_accesspoint_london <- st_read("OS-Open-Greenspace-GB/GB_AccessPoint/GB_AccessPoint.shp") %>%
  # Ensure consistent CRS
  st_transform(st_crs(lsoa_london)) %>%
  # Filter to London only
  .[st_intersects(., st_union(lsoa_london), sparse = FALSE), ]
```

```{r}
# filter to all Camden LSOAs
camden_lsoa <- lsoa_london %>%
  filter(grepl("Camden", LSOA21NM))

# check how many LSOAs Camden has
nrow(camden_lsoa)
```

## 3. Create Origin and Destinations

### Origin

```{r}
sf_use_s2(FALSE)

# create origin points
origins <- st_centroid(camden_lsoa) %>%
  # reproject
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  # create new column
  mutate(
    id  = LSOA21CD,
    long = unlist(map(geometry,1)),
    lat = unlist(map(geometry,2))
  )
# remove geometry column
origins$geometry <- NULL
# only keep id, lon and lat
origins <- origins %>%
  select(id, long, lat)

head(origins, 5)
```

### Destination 

Testing on Camden borough only, so filter greenspace access points to Camden only first:

```{r}
greenspace_accesspoint_camden <- greenspace_accesspoint_london[
  st_intersects(greenspace_accesspoint_london, st_union(camden_lsoa), sparse = FALSE), ]

nrow(greenspace_accesspoint_camden)
```

```{r}
destinations <- greenspace_accesspoint_camden %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  mutate(
    id  = as.character(row_number()),
    lon = unlist(map(geometry, 1)),
    lat = unlist(map(geometry, 2))
  )

destinations$geometry <- NULL

destinations <- destinations %>%
  select(id, lon, lat)

head(destinations, 5)
cat("Number of destination access points:", nrow(destinations), "\n")
```

## 4. r5r

```{r}
# increase Java memory
options(java.parameters = "-Xmx6G")

# load libraries
library(r5r)

#path <- system.file("r5r_path", package = "r5r")
r5r_core <- setup_r5(data_path = "r5r_data/r5r_london_data.")
```
